title: Law Office of COX & SANCHEZ ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Law Firm of Cox & Sanchez has been committed to serving the residents of the State of Florida with clear, concise, and actionable answers to their legal issue for nearing 40 years. We are budget-conscious, and results driven and treat each client with dignity and respect. We know that listening and understanding your exact and distinct legal problems will lead to most efficient solutions.
